text:
There once was an old owl. Every morning he would sleep owl hours. He liked mornings.

One morning he had an idea. Maybe he could scare some mice away. So he flew around.

He liked scaring mice. Well, maybe.

Eventually he changed his mind. He didn't want any harm. He just maybe wanted fish.

So he flew south. That seemed harmless.

He happened upon treasure.

It was hard to hide. Why save it?

But he hid it.

Later he felt kind. He made some bird neighbors. They liked his treasures. They gave him food.

That was good.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
